label: Sets, point clouds & meshes

node.label: Sets, point clouds & meshes
node.definition: Permutation-invariant or geometric collections represent objects, surfaces, particles, and unordered observations.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Sets, point clouds & meshes is to connect Geometry, topology & symmetry, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI, Computer vision, perception & scene understanding.
examples: substrate for Computer vision, perception & scene understanding
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Geometry, topology & symmetry, Probability theory.

dependencies.rationale: Sets, point clouds & meshes rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Geometry, topology & symmetry.
Sets, point clouds & meshes rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
Sets, point clouds & meshes consumes, emits, or organizes information using Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
